channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: OKX Rolls Out Round the Clock Trading for Mag Seven Stocks Using Crypto Collateral
item.description: The derivatives give users synthetic exposure to major U.S. equities while using Bitcoin and other crypto holdings as collateral, with plans to expand into tokenized assets later this year.

item.title: Aave DAO backs V4 mainnet plan in near-unanimous vote
item.description: Aave founder Stani Kulechov says the proposal will move to a binding onchain vote to formalize V4’s deployment on Ethereum.

item.title: As mass adoption approaches, crypto has forgotten its roots
item.description: Mass adoption risks crypto’s cypherpunk roots. Privacy as a permissionless foundation must reclaim DeFi from surveillance, TradFi and memecoin casinos.

item.title: Here’s how Treasuries could shape Trump’s Iran war and bitcoin moves
item.description: Treasury yields and swap spreads could eventually pressure the Trump administration to moderate the conflict, analysts argue.

item.title: SEC’s top enforcer clashed over Trump cases before quitting: Report
item.description: The SEC’s handling of cases involving Justin Sun and Elon Musk was among the factors that caused the agency’s top enforcement official to quit, according to sources.

item.title: Balancer Labs will shut down as corporate entity became 'a liability' after $110 million exploit
item.description: Co-founder Fernando Martinelli said he considered winding down the entire protocol but decided the team deserved a chance to restructure, with the DAO targeting zero emissions, fee restructuring, and a BAL buyback to offer holders a fair e…

item.title: Major Australian pension fund mulls crypto offerings amid growing demand
item.description: Hostplus is the third-largest super fund in Australia by members, with 2.2 million, and the fifth-largest by assets under management, with over $96 billion in assets.

item.title: 21M+ merchants already accept @binance payments. Crypto is becoming the global standard for commerce. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9jM1BvVFpDOW52YTJmaFdldkhYWWRZTjRZZldHRTduV1hONDFfeFNyVWU2YUlXcllBbHJ6QTRIUXZhVmk0THVfVnJyTWliaWVTNDI4UGs5ZjRWT2FnUEJncnBVWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">21M+ merchants already accept @b…

item.title: Circle asks EU to ease crypto thresholds in proposed markets framework
item.description: Circle said no euro-denominated "e-money token," including its EURC stablecoin, has reached the framework's proposed market cap threshold for use in settlement.

item.title: TRON DAO expands AI fund to $1B as agentic economy race heats up
item.description: The $1 billion AI fund targets investments in stablecoin rails, agent identity, tokenized RWAs and developer tooling for autonomous AI systems.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana prices move higher as Gulf allies inch toward joining Iran war
item.description: Crypto recovered on Tuesday morning even as Monday's relief rally unraveled across traditional markets, with oil jumping 4% on reports that Saudi Arabia and the UAE are moving to join the conflict.

item.title: Delaware eyes stablecoin licensing framework under banking laws
item.description: The stablecoin bill introduced in Delaware aims to create a licensing framework for stablecoin issuers as part of the state's first major banking code update since 1981.

item.title: Bitmine chair sees ‘mini-crypto winter’ thaw for ETH as it hits 77% of goal
item.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies bought another $139 million in Ether last week, bringing its ETH holdings to 4.6 million.

item.title: Australian Pension Fund Weighs Crypto Access Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Hostplus’s crypto ambition is attempting to meet rising investor demand, even as volatility keeps rivals on the sidelines.

item.title: Balancer Labs Winds Down Months After $128M DeFi Exploit
item.description: The restructuring comes as analysts say older DeFi models built on token incentives and emissions are increasingly under pressure.

item.title: Bitcoin's mining concentration just showed up in a rare 2-block reorg
item.description: A 2-block reorg at height 941,881 saw Foundry's chain overwrite blocks from AntPool and ViaBTC, coming days after mining difficulty dropped nearly 8%.

item.title: 🚨NEW: New details are emerging about the latest legislative text outlining a compromise on stablecoin yield and rewards, along with early reactions from crypto industry leaders who reviewed it today. According to an internal stakeholder email shared with me, - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFAwa0NGSHpLR1BjYTBFX0JJZk84TDRybHUzT1BwVVFSQ2hFR3RtcXNQYm8tMDVpVTRWSlJjal9BaVFWcEM1QU9zWjE4cldXZWhkbHdIdnJiNDc2am1IbXp0QUs3ZVlGQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: New details are emerg…

item.title: Balancer Labs shuts down 4 months after $100M+ exploit, protocol to continue
item.description: Executives at Balancer Labs are now pushing for the protocol to be managed by the Balancer Foundation and Balancer’s DAO.

item.title: 🇺🇸 TODAY: The SEC submits proposed crypto interpretation framework to White House for review, seeking to clarify which digital assets qualify as securities under federal law. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBBMzk3ZXl6ZUg0c1VGeEw1ZFNLT01XWDk5b0lTdFNkd1ZhN0JBRnRfenYxb08zZnhuc184MVBhLVdWeWFQU3ViOHJnd3NyV3hFNU5qMDVydFJPc1l6aVh0TkR6X3Q?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 TODAY: The SEC submits pro…

item.title: ⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation outlines L1-L2 strategy with L1 serving as resilient settlement hub while L2s drive differentiation and customization for thriving ecosystem. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBVbXV4LVBQVUVmc2xialBjbjhVeE1fSXhLX0EtQkNiQlNGZmkyT2hLOEJ1SlR6YXk0MXV2UnBOdm15OWV2SEl3TUIwZGZJSlN2bGY1eURKQlBzei12WGh4YkpEOUY?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ NEW: Ethereum Foundation out…

item.title: Kalshi joins Polymarket in sweeping user bans to head off insider trading
item.description: Kalshi and Polymarket have moved to restrict insider trading on the same day lawmakers introduced a bipartisan bill to ban popular sports event contracts.

item.title: Eyecare biotech jumps 19% after stablecoin-focused pivot
item.description: NovaBay Pharmaceuticals was founded in 2000 as a biopharmaceutical company developing eye care products and is now betting big on the Sky protocol and stablecoins.

item.title: Strategy unveils $44.1B capital-raising capacity to buy more Bitcoin
item.description: Strategy is increasingly turning to perpetual preferred stocks to fund its Bitcoin strategy, with the company adding 90,000 BTC to its balance sheet so far this year.

item.title: Protesters Rally Outside OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI Offices Over Industry Concerns
item.description: Protesters marched between the San Francisco offices of major AI developers, calling for a pause in the development of more powerful AI systems.

item.title: Stablecoin yield in crypto Clarity Act won't allow rewards on balances, latest text says
item.description: The crypto industry got a first look at legislative language that won't allow rewards on stablecoin balances, and the approach is seen as restrictive.

item.title: Bitcoin’s battle for $70K continues as data shows traders avoiding bullish positioning
item.description: Rising inflation concerns weigh on Bitcoin’s breakout as traders refuse to take on bullish positions, despite Monday’s 4% price bounce.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Senator Warren questions whether MrBeast will market crypto to kids
item.description: A letter to the influencer and the CEO of his holding company expressed concerns about whether the two will allow minors to trade crypto through a recently acquired banking app.

item.title: Bitcoin holds above $70,000, but future direction hinges on Iran-U.S. 'talks'
item.description: Cryptos bounced on Trump’s five-day pause announcement, but the next move hinges on whether tensions between the U.S. and Iran ease or spiral, a Wintermute trader said.

item.title: Stripe protocol could mark turning point for micropayments, Forrester says
item.description: Forrester says Stripe’s Machine Payments Protocol could unlock micropayments by shifting transactions from user-driven to automated, agent-based systems.

item.title: Polymarket, Kalshi Make Moves to Counter Insider Trading as Scrutiny Grows
item.description: Leading prediction market platforms Polymarket and Kalshi are taking new steps to try and counter insider trading.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Recovery Paints Familiar Pattern—And That’s the Problem: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin bulls are feeling it right now. But the BTC price chart is quietly drawing the same pattern it drew before two major crashes in a row.

item.title: Glider, Ondo launch platform for custom tokenized stock portfolios
item.description: The platform lets investors create and rebalance onchain equity portfolios while directly holding the underlying assets.

item.title: Why Other Bitcoin Treasury Firms Are Betting on Strategy's 'iPhone Moment'
item.description: Strategy's Michael Saylor said STRC could be interesting for “a whole class of people.” The preferred share is showing up on peers’ balance sheets.

item.title: Bitcoin has been bleeding to Gold since December 2024. A single green monthly candle after 7 red consecutive monthly candles does not automatically mean the trend is over. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5XZ3VQLTVIblpkVVJKeVdpV3FMclNfejM3bGZsa256THBDTS1kbS1fUjZHY3hHak5Oa25BS1oxeXVyQ2tPZUhic2RSaFpYSmUyZzljbUsyUnJqeGhnakxOTHZYd1NxVFk?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has been bleeding t…

item.title: Solana Foundation targets institutions with new privacy framework
item.description: The organization argued that the next phase of crypto adoption will depend less on transparency alone and more on giving companies control over what they reveal — and to whom.

item.title: Prediction market boom spurs new VC fund backed by Polymarket, Kalshi CEOs
item.description: The fund, called 5c(c) Capital, is aiming to raise $35 million to fund startups tied to the rapid growth of event-based trading markets.

item.title: SEC sends proposed crypto interpretation to White House for review
item.description: The SEC’s crypto classification proposal is under White House review, marking a key step in defining how digital assets are treated under US securities law.

item.title: Fake Influencers to Compete for Real Money in 'AI Personality of the Year' Challenge
item.description: OpenArt and Fanvue have launched a four-week global challenge with a $90K+ prize pool to find the best AI personality of 2026.

item.title: Will MrBeast Push Crypto on Kids? Senator Warren Raises Alarm Over Banking App
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren urged MrBeast to move cautiously as his firm considers integrating crypto into a newly acquired mobile banking app.

item.title: Polymarket tightens rules to curb manipulation, insider trading risks
item.description: Polymarket introduced stricter trading safeguards and market limits as it responds to concerns over manipulation, insider trading and market fairness.

item.title: Bitcoin spot volumes fall to 2023 lows as BTC rallies remain news-led
item.description: Bitcoin price topped $71,600 at the US market open, but the rally lacked sustained spot volumes. Can the bulls hold BTC above $70,000?

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Court Letter Under Scrutiny As Parents Call For Clemency
item.description: Prosecutors said there was "reason to doubt" that a recent court letter supposedly from Sam Bankman-Fried was actually sent by him

item.title: Arrest Made in Violent Kidnapping of Ledger Founder for Crypto Ransom: Report
item.description: An individual was arrested in Spain for their alleged role in the violent kidnapping of Ledger co-founder David Balland and his wife last year.

item.title: European Bitcoin Treasury H100 Aims to Triple BTC Stash by Acquiring Two Firms
item.description: The Swedish Bitcoin treasury firm signed a letter of intent to acquire Moonshot and Never Say Die in an all-stock deal.

item.title: BlackRock is betting billions that tokenized funds will do for Wall Street what the internet did to mail
item.description: In his annual letter, BlackRock CEO Larry Fink argues that digital wallets and tokenized assets could modernize markets and expand investor access.

item.title: Senators Reveal Bipartisan Bill to Outlaw Sports Prediction Markets
item.description: The bill, from Adam Schiff (D-CA) and John Curtis (R-UT), has already been condemned by one of America’s top prediction market platforms.

item.title: Ethereum Price Jumps on Iran Optimism as Tom Lee's BitMine Adds to $10 Billion Stash
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies now holds more than $10 billion worth of Ethereum, leading the ETH treasury pack as the asset rebounds.

item.title: Strategy tops up capital-raising plans, bringing potential bitcoin buying power back to $42 billion
item.description: Expanded share issuance plans and new Wall Street partners boost capital raising firepower.

item.title: Strategy Unveils $44 Billion Plan to Buy More Bitcoin, Driven By MSTR and STRC Shares
item.description: Strategy shared plans to issue $44 billion in equity, a move aimed at providing its Bitcoin-buying machine with fuel for future purchases.

item.title: Pharmaceutical firm pivots to stablecoins, holds nearly 9% of SKY's supply
item.description: Nanocap NovaBay Pharmaceuticals changed its name to Stablecoin Development Corporation.

item.title: Backpack launches BP token on Solana with 25% airdrop, no insider allocation
item.description: The remaining tokens are subject to long-term lockups tied to company milestones and a potential IPO.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor’s Strategy announces new $42 billion plan to buy more Bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBfM0czdmxuYnB4cUVmeEhXMFMwWkV5bVFpVkFpSkJBVS12ZlZic3pZSmtaQVJDZG9raXNOOVFlQmUyMUF2VkFyVmpwQ3g4RUhSSFBNdG81MFBHU1lXQjc4dlZ6aHZTSVk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor’s S…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) gains 2.3%, leading index higher
item.description: Solana (SOL), up 1% from Friday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Crypto Markets Grapple With Volatility as ETFs Shed $177M Last Week
item.description: Crypto ETFs shed $177M last week as Bitcoin pulled back from $75,000, though experts remain bullish on Q2's prospects.

item.title: 🚨🗞️NEW: Crypto and Bank Reps Head to Capitol Hill to Review Stablecoin Deal as Details Remain Under Wraps Some crypto industry leaders will meet with @BankingGOP today, with banks set for tomorrow, to review the product of a long-awaited comprom - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBZQ3lEdFhmM0FMNjhCWE5wUGxJdUxkczBac1l2TmsxRE81Y3c3MjkyM0RLTXVyc2EtSzRHbVJyLVYzcWdvcUppa2J2Yk1xYllybW00Q2RtZW13bFM3U0s5NzA5NlBVUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨🗞️NEW: Crypto and Bank Re…

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine extends buying streak with $138 million ETH purchase, betting on crypto slump ending
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm led by Thomas Lee now has increased its buying pace for three consecutive weeks even as unrealized losses mount.

item.title: Bitcoin's wild roller coaster ride leaves leveraged traders with $415 million in liquidations
item.description: Bitcoin swung from $67,500 to $71,200 and back to $70,000 in a single session as Trump said he was postponing Iran strikes, then Iran denied any communication was taking place.

item.title: H100 eyes Europe’s largest bitcoin treasury with 3,500 BTC in proposed acquistions
item.description: Proposed bitcoin-for-bitcoin acquisition of Moonshot and Never Say Die would triple the company's holdings and expand institutional scale.

item.title: Strategy returns to 'small' bitcoin purchases, adding $76.6 million in BTC last week
item.description: Led by Executive Chairman Michael Saylor, Strategy acquired 1,031 bitcoin, bringing holdings to 762,099 coins.
